title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into and Sign in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños in a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Family Vaccines and Specialty Clinics for the Continuation of the Fvsc Animal Bite Clinic at Rural Health Unit 2 (RHU 2) of Los Baños,laguna. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON,02/08/2022)
